intro: Tuberolabium rhopalorrhachis, also known as the Rhopalorrhachis Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Bioactive constituents of Tuberolabium rhopalorrhachis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
